hooks.command: bash -c 'file="$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT" | grep -o '"'"'[^"]*'"'"' | head -1)"; if [[ "$file" == */src/* || "$file" == */lib/* || "$file" == */bin/* ]]; then shellcheck -s bash -e 1072,1094 -x "$file" && echo "shellcheck: OK" || echo "shellcheck: FAILED — fix errors before committing"; fi'

bash -c 'git -C "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" log -1 --pretty=%B 2>/dev/null | grep -q "signed-off-by" || echo "REMINDER: Last commit is missing the signed-off-by line. See CLAUDE.md for the git hook to add it automatically."'
